pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the geotechnical consulting firm, highlighting core services, featured projects, resources, and tools, with prominent CTAs.
primary_functions: Provide quick access to main sections: Services, Projects, Resources, Tools, Our Team, and Consultations
Highlight core services such as slope stability, subsurface investigation, and foundation design
Offer prominent calls to action for requesting a quote and booking a consultation
Show featured case studies and key resources to help users explore expertise

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on main navigation 'Services' or homepage Services CTA
Click on featured 'Slope Stability & Retaining Walls' service card
Click on featured 'Subsurface Investigation' service card
Click on primary 'Request a Quote' CTA in hero
Click on 'View all projects' link or Projects navigation
Click on a featured project/case study card
Click on 'View all resources' link
Click on a featured resource item
Click on 'Tools & Calculators' section
Click on featured 'Bearing Capacity Calculator' tool
Click on 'Meet our team' link
Click on 'Book a Consultation' CTA on the homepage
Click on 'Learn more about us' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Home' in main navigation
Logo/footer home link returns to homepage
Direct access via index.html
Newsletter subscription form in footer uses subscribeToNewsletter

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: High-level overview of all consulting services offered by the firm, helping users choose the right service and route into detailed pages or quotes.
primary_functions: List all service categories with brief descriptions and links to detailed service pages
Help users decide which service (e.g., slope stability, subsurface investigation) best matches their needs
Provide generic 'Request a Quote' call to action that leads to the quote request form

incoming_params.description: Optional service slug to scroll to or visually highlight (e.g., 'slope-stability-retaining-walls').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Slope Stability & Retaining Walls' service tile
Click on 'Subsurface Investigation' service tile
Click on generic 'Request a Quote' button without specifying a service
Click on 'Request a Quote' CTA within Subsurface Investigation summary card
Click on 'Request a Quote' CTA within Slope Stability summary card

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Services' in main navigation
Accessible via 'Services Overview' footer link
Optional highlightServiceSlug parameter can be used to focus on a specific service

pages.name: Slope Stability & Retaining Walls Service
pages.description: Dedicated service page for slope stability analyses and retaining wall design, with methods, deliverables, and related work.
primary_functions: Explain slope stability and retaining wall services, including typical applications like highway embankments
Present benefits, methods, and typical deliverables for slope stability projects
Provide a prominent 'Get a Quote' button that leads to the quote_request.html form preconfigured for slope stability
Surface related case studies and resources on slope stability and retaining walls

incoming_params.description: Optional referral source identifier (e.g., 'home', 'services', 'project_case_study') for analytics and minor UI tweaks.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on primary 'Get a Quote' button
Click on 'View slope stability projects' in related case studies
Click on 'View all slope stability resources'
Click on 'Retaining wall design guides & checklists'
Click on an individual related case study card
Click on a featured retaining wall or slope stability resource
Click 'Book a slope stability consultation' CTA if present

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Slope Stability & Retaining Walls' header link
Accessible via 'Slope Stability Services' footer link
Linked from Services overview and relevant project/resource pages
Optional 'ref' parameter used for tracking how user arrived

pages.name: Subsurface Investigation Service
pages.description: Service page for subsurface exploration and geotechnical investigation offerings, including packages and pricing.
primary_functions: Describe subsurface investigation capabilities (borings, CPT, lab testing, etc.) and typical use cases
Provide a 'Packages & Pricing' section showing investigation packages with filters for project type and budget
Allow users to filter investigation packages by project type (e.g., building foundations) and maximum price
Display investigation package cards with key features and a 'View Details' button leading to package_detail.html
Offer a call to action to request a custom investigation quote if packages do not fit user needs

incoming_params.description: Optional default project type filter (e.g., 'building_foundations').
Optional maximum price used to pre-populate the price filter for packages.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View Details' or the title of an investigation package card
Click on 'Request custom investigation quote' CTA

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Subsurface Investigation' header link
Accessible via 'Subsurface Investigation Packages' footer link
Optional projectType and maxPrice query parameters preconfigure the Packages & Pricing filters

pages.name: Investigation Package Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific subsurface investigation package, including scope, inclusions, and ability to save to a named plan.
primary_functions: Show full package details including scope, included tests (such as CPT soundings and consolidation testing), and deliverables
Display package price and any assumptions or limitations
Provide a 'Select this package' button that initiates a 'Save to project / Save plan' dialog
Allow the user to name a project (e.g., 'Headquarters foundation study') and save the package to My Plans (my_projects.html)

incoming_params.description: ID of the investigation package whose details are displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: After saving a package to a named project and clicking 'View in My Plans'

access_methods.description: Accessed via package_detail.html?packageId={id}
Linked from the Packages & Pricing section and My Plans

pages.name: Quote Request
pages.description: Centralized quote request form for geotechnical services, including slope stability, with configurable service levels and budget.
primary_functions: Allow users to select a service type (e.g., 'Slope stability analysis for embankments') from a dropdown
Capture project context such as project type (e.g., 'Highway / Roadway'), location (city and ZIP), and anticipated start date
Present service level options with descriptions and prices so users can compare and choose the appropriate level
Enable selection of the cheapest service level that includes stability modeling for slope stability quotes
Capture budget constraints (e.g., maximum budget in USD) and submit the completed quote request

incoming_params.description: Optional default service type (e.g., 'slope_stability_embankments') that pre-selects the Service Type dropdown.
Optional default project type (e.g., 'highway_roadway').
Optional default city for the project location.
Optional default ZIP/postal code for the project location.
Optional anticipated construction start date prefill (ISO date string).
Optional maximum budget used to pre-populate the budget field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Book a follow-up consultation' link after successful quote submission

access_methods.description: Linked from homepage, Services overview, and service detail pages
Optional query parameters preconfigure service type, project type, location, and start date

pages.name: Projects & Case Studies
pages.description: Listing and filter page for project case studies across sectors and foundation types.
primary_functions: Display a searchable, filterable list of completed projects and case studies
Provide filters for sector (e.g., commercial buildings), foundation type (e.g., pile foundations), and other attributes
Allow filtering by project value, including setting a minimum (e.g., $5M) or selecting appropriate ranges
Offer sorting options such as 'Project value  High to Low' to prioritize higher-value projects
Link each project card to its detailed case study page on project_detail.html

incoming_params.description: Optional sector filter (e.g., 'commercial_buildings') applied on initial load.
Optional foundation type filter (e.g., 'pile_foundations').
Optional minimum project value filter in USD (e.g., 5000000).
Optional predefined project value range ID.
Optional sort option (e.g., 'value_desc' for 'Project value – High to Low').
Optional page number for pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a project/case study card title or image
Click on 'Request similar project quote' for a transportation/highway project if present

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Projects' in main navigation
Accessible via 'Projects & Case Studies' footer link
Filters and sorting can be initialized via query parameters

pages.name: Project / Case Study Detail
pages.description: Detailed project case study page for a specific geotechnical project, including narrative and key metrics.
primary_functions: Present full details of the selected project, including sector, foundation type, project value, and location
Describe the geotechnical challenges, approach, analyses (e.g., pile foundations), and outcomes
Include a 'Read full case study' link or control to expand or jump to the full narrative content
Offer links to related projects or services relevant to the showcased work

incoming_params.description: ID of the project case study to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to all projects' link
Click on 'View more commercial pile foundation projects'
Click on a related slope stability service link
Click on a related subsurface investigation service link
Click on 'Request a similar foundation design quote' CTA
Click on 'Discuss a similar project' consultation CTA

access_methods.description: Accessed via project_detail.html?id={projectId}
Linked from project listing, homepage featured projects, and team member profiles

pages.name: Resources & Knowledge Center
pages.description: Library of guides, checklists, technical notes, and other reference materials with rich filtering and sorting.
primary_functions: List resources with key metadata such as title, type, topic, level, and publication date
Provide filters for resource type (e.g., guides & checklists), topic/discipline (e.g., retaining walls), and user level (e.g., intermediate)
Allow filtering by published date range (e.g., items published on or after 01/01/2022)
Provide sorting options such as 'Newest first' or 'Most recent'
Link each resource to its detail page on resource_detail.html for viewing and downloading

incoming_params.description: Optional resource type filter (e.g., 'guides_checklists').
Optional topic filter (e.g., 'retaining_walls').
Optional experience level filter (e.g., 'intermediate').
Optional filter for minimum published date (ISO date string, e.g., '2022-01-01').
Optional sort option (e.g., 'newest').
Optional free-text search query.
Optional page number for pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a resource title or 'View details' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Resources' main navigation link
Accessible via 'Resources & Checklists' and 'Retaining Wall Resources' footer links with pre-applied filters
Filters and sort order can be initialized via query parameters

pages.name: Resource Detail
pages.description: Detail page for an individual resource item (e.g., retaining wall design checklist) with metadata and download controls.
primary_functions: Display the resource title, summary, publication date, level, and topic
Allow users to download the resource as a PDF via a 'Download PDF' button or link
Highlight key sections or preview content so users can confirm relevance before downloading
Provide links to related resources on similar topics or at similar experience levels

incoming_params.description: ID of the resource to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to retaining wall resources' link
Click on a related resource in the sidebar or bottom section

access_methods.description: Accessed via resource_detail.html?id={resourceId}
Linked from Resources listing and featured resources on other pages

pages.name: Book a Consultation
pages.description: Online booking page for scheduling consultations with geotechnical specialists, with calendar and time slot selection.
primary_functions: Allow users to select meeting type (e.g., virtual meeting) and consultant specialty (e.g., foundation design)
Provide a calendar date picker to select a specific consultation date (e.g., 03/18/2025 or the next available Tuesday)
Show available time slots for the selected date, including 30-minute intervals within specified time windows
Capture project stage (e.g., 'Concept / Early design'), name, and email contact information
Finalize the booking via a 'Confirm Booking' or 'Schedule Consultation' button and display confirmation details

incoming_params.description: Optional default meeting type (e.g., 'virtual_meeting').
Optional default consultant specialty (e.g., 'foundation_design').
Optional default project stage (e.g., 'concept_early_design').
Optional pre-selected date for the consultation calendar (ISO date string).

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Book a Consultation' header link
Accessible via 'Book a Consultation' footer link
Linked from homepage hero and various service pages as CTA
Optional meetingType, specialty, projectStage, and date parameters preconfigure the form and calendar

pages.name: Tools Overview
pages.description: Landing page summarizing available geotechnical tools and calculators, including shallow foundation calculators.
primary_functions: List available online tools (e.g., Bearing Capacity Calculator) with short descriptions
Explain typical use cases and limitations for each tool
Provide quick links to individual tools such as bearing_capacity_calculator.html
Encourage users to pair tool use with professional consultation where appropriate

incoming_params.description: Optional tool slug to highlight or scroll to (e.g., 'bearing-capacity-calculator').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Bearing Capacity Calculator' tool card

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Tools' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Tools & Calculators' footer link
Optional highlightToolSlug parameter used to focus on a particular tool

pages.name: Bearing Capacity Calculator
pages.description: Interactive calculator for estimating allowable bearing capacity for shallow foundations, with save-to-project functionality.
primary_functions: Allow users to select soil type (e.g., 'Medium dense sand') and input footing width and depth with unit controls
Accept a factor of safety value and optional project location data (e.g., 'Chicago')
Run the calculation and display the computed bearing capacity and key assumptions
Provide a 'Save Result' or 'Save to Project' feature that opens a dialog to name a project (e.g., 'Office Tower A') and store the result in My Plans (my_projects.html)

incoming_params.description: Optional default soil type (e.g., 'medium_dense_sand').
Optional default footing width.
Optional default footing embedment depth.
Optional default factor of safety.
Optional default project location string (e.g., 'Chicago').
Optional bearing capacity method (e.g., 'terzaghi').
Optional ID of a previously saved calculation to reload.

outgoing_connections.trigger: After saving a calculation result and clicking 'View in My Plans'

access_methods.description: Accessible directly via 'Bearing Capacity Calculator' header link
Accessible via 'Bearing Capacity Calculator' footer link
Linked from Tools overview and related resources
Optional parameters preconfigure the calculator or reload a prior calculation

pages.name: Our Team Directory
pages.description: Directory of geotechnical staff with filters to find relevant experts by region, discipline, and skills.
primary_functions: List team members with summary information such as name, title, region, and key skills
Provide filters for region (e.g., West/Western US) and discipline/expertise (e.g., geotechnical engineering)
Offer a keyword or skills search field (e.g., for 'slope stability') to refine the list
Link each team member to a detailed profile on team_member.html
Provide access to a 'View project team' or 'Shortlist' link that opens the My Plans & Project Team page (my_projects.html)

incoming_params.description: Optional region filter (e.g., 'west').
Optional discipline filter (e.g., 'geotechnical_engineering').
Optional minimum years of experience filter.
Optional skills keyword filter (e.g., 'slope stability').
Optional sort option (e.g., 'experience_desc').
Optional page number for pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a team member card or 'View profile' link
Click on 'View project team' or shortlist link in header/sidebar

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Our Team' header link
Accessible via 'Our Team' footer link
Region, discipline, experience, and skill filters can be initialized via query parameters

pages.name: Team Member Profile
pages.description: Detailed profile page for an individual geotechnical expert with experience summary and key skills.
primary_functions: Present bio details: role, years of experience, regions served, and key technical skills (e.g., slope stability, landslide analysis)
Highlight relevant project experience and case studies for that team member
Provide an 'Add to project team' or 'Shortlist' button to add qualifying experts to the user's project team list
Offer navigation back to the filtered team directory (team.html) to continue building a shortlist

incoming_params.description: ID of the team member whose profile is displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to team directory' link
After adding a team member to shortlist and clicking 'View project team'
Click on a highlighted project in the team member's experience list

access_methods.description: Accessed via team_member.html?id={teamMemberId}
Linked from team directory and My Plans project team section

pages.name: My Plans & Project Team
pages.description: Single-user workspace showing saved investigation plans, calculator results, and the project team shortlist.
primary_functions: List saved investigation packages (e.g., 'Headquarters foundation study') and allow users to view or rename them
Display saved calculation results (e.g., bearing capacity for 'Office Tower A') with basic details and options to revisit the tool
Show the current project team shortlist of selected experts, with names and key skills, for a specific project or region
Allow users to remove items (packages, results, or experts) from their saved plans or shortlist
Provide contextual links back to the relevant pages (package_detail.html, bearing_capacity_calculator.html, team.html) to refine selections

incoming_params.description: Optional tab to show by default: 'plans', 'calculations', or 'team'.
Optional plan ID to visually highlight in the saved investigation plans list.
Optional result ID to highlight in the saved bearing capacity results list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View package details' for a saved investigation plan
Click on 'View calculation' for a saved bearing capacity result
Click on a shortlisted team member's name

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'My Plans & Project Team' footer link
Linked from save/shortlist confirmation states on Package Detail, Bearing Capacity Calculator, and Team pages
Tab and highlight parameters determine which section is emphasized on load

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Background information about the geotechnical consulting firm, including mission, history, regions, and sectors served.
primary_functions: Describe the firms mission, history, regions served, and primary sectors (e.g., transportation, buildings, infrastructure)
Highlight core competencies including slope stability, foundations, and subsurface investigations
Provide high-level contact information and a simple contact section or anchor for general inquiries
Link to other key pages such as Our Team (team.html), Projects (projects.html), and Services (services.html)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Explore our services' link
Click on 'View our project experience' link
Click on 'Meet the team' link
Click on 'Schedule a consultation' link in contact section

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' header navigation link
Accessible via 'About Us' footer link
